releaseNotes:
Full PSA cert-page authority rebuild.
- PSA cert page now acts as authoritative metadata and pricing source
- Added PSA sales-history parsing
- Added PSA estimate parsing
- Added stable front/back slab image extraction
- Rebuilt PSA pricing handoff using PSA-normalized card identity
- eBay Browse API now acts as supplemental PSA enrichment
- TAG, CGC, sync, updater, and shared credentials unchanged
